facebook.caption:
766 reviews. 4.7 stars. And most tourists walk right past it.

Huong Bien Restaurant on 1 Võ Thị Sáu serves Vietnamese seafood the way locals actually eat it. No flashy beachfront markup. Just solid food, real portions, and a crowd that keeps coming back.

If your Phu Quoc itinerary is heavy on resort restaurants, this is the correction.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the seafood land on this table at Huong Bien Restaurant. 766 people rated it 4.7 stars. The line outside at dinner tells you the rest.
